{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Ka’nie’ka
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Ka’nie’ka]] was the former name of the [[Eldest]] [[Nye]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Ka’nie’ka]] wants to restore [[Valinhall]]'s power.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“Ka’nie’ka is selfish and afraid. He—” ... “That was the Eldest Nye’s name once, before his title.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
